ns0:entry.ns0:title: 648540858/wvp-GB28181-pro
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/648540858/wvp-GB28181-pro
Language: java
基于GB28181-2016、部标808、部标1078标准实现的开箱即用的网络视频平台。自带管理页面，支持NAT穿透，支持海康、大华、宇视等品牌的IPC、NVR接入。支持国标级联，支持将普通摄像机/直播流/直播推流转国标共享到国标平台。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenAPITools/openapi-generator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenAPITools/openapi-generator
Language: java
OpenAPI Generator allows generation of API client libraries (SDK generation), server stubs, documentation and configuration automatically given an OpenAPI Spec (v2, v3)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenLineage/OpenLineage
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenLineage/OpenLineage
Language: java
An Open Standard for lineage metadata collection

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PaperMC/Paper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PaperMC/Paper
Language: java
The most widely used, high performance Minecraft server that aims to fix gameplay and mechanics inconsistencies

ns0:entry.ns0:title: StarRocks/starrocks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/StarRocks/starrocks
Language: java
The world's fastest open query engine for sub-second analytics both on and off the data lakehouse. With the flexibility to support nearly any scenario, StarRocks provides best-in-class performance for multi-dimensional analytics, real-time analytics, and ad-hoc queries. A Linux Foundation project.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: agentscope-ai/agentscope-java
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/agentscope-ai/agentscope-java
Language: java
AgentScope Java: Agent-Oriented Programming for Building LLM Applications

URL: https://github.com/alibaba/spring-ai-alibaba
Language: java
Agentic AI Framework for Java Developers

URL: https://github.com/apache/iotdb
Language: java
Apache IoTDB

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ashishps1/awesome-system-design-resources
Language: java
Learn System Design concepts and prepare for interviews using free resources.

Language: java
Free and Open Source, Distributed, RESTful Search Engine

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/graphhopper/graphhopper
Language: java
Open source routing engine for OpenStreetMap. Use it as Java library or standalone web server.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iflytek/astron-agent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iflytek/astron-agent
Language: java
Enterprise-grade, commercial-friendly agentic workflow platform for building next-generation SuperAgents.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iluwatar/java-design-patterns
Language: java
Design patterns implemented in Java

ns0:entry.ns0:title: krahets/hello-algo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/krahets/hello-algo
Language: java
《Hello 算法》：动画图解、一键运行的数据结构与算法教程。支持简中、繁中、English、日本語，提供 Python, Java, C++, C, C#, JS, Go, Swift, Rust, Ruby, Kotlin, TS, Dart 等代码实现

ns0:entry.ns0:title: langchain4j/langchain4j
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/langchain4j/langchain4j
Language: java
LangChain4j is an open-source Java library that simplifies the integration of LLMs into Java applications through a unified API, providing access to popular LLMs and vector databases. It makes implementing RAG, tool calling (including support for MCP), and agents easy. LangChain4j integrates seamlessly with various enterprise Java frameworks.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: micrometer-metrics/micrometer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/micrometer-metrics/micrometer
Language: java
An application observability facade for the most popular observability tools. Think SLF4J, but for observability.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: netty/netty
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/netty/netty
Language: java
Netty project - an event-driven asynchronous network application framework

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openjdk/jdk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openjdk/jdk
Language: java
JDK main-line development https://openjdk.org/projects/jdk

ns0:entry.ns0:title: redisson/redisson
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/redisson/redisson
Language: java
Redisson - Valkey & Redis Java client. Real-Time Data Platform. Sync/Async/RxJava/Reactive API. Over 50 Valkey and Redis based Java objects and services: Set, Multimap, SortedSet, Map, List, Queue, Deque, Semaphore, Lock, AtomicLong, Map Reduce, Bloom filter, Spring, Tomcat, Scheduler, JCache API, Hibernate, RPC, local cache..

ns0:entry.ns0:title: spring-projects/spring-framework
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework
Language: java
Spring Framework

ns0:entry.ns0:title: testcontainers/testcontainers-java
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/testcontainers/testcontainers-java
Language: java
Testcontainers is a Java library that supports JUnit tests, providing lightweight, throwaway instances of common databases, Selenium web browsers, or anything else that can run in a Docker container.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: xuxueli/xxl-job
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/xuxueli/xxl-job
Language: java
A distributed task scheduling framework.（分布式任务调度平台XXL-JOB）
